changelog: Social Feature Stabilizing - Hardened friends and requests streams to prevent loading hangs.
Contact Identification - Primary focus on unique @usernames to avoid 'Unknown' name issues.
Ultra-Clean Map View - Removed all Mapbox watermarks, logos, and Scale Bars for a premium experience.
Overflow & Layout Fixes - Wrapped social screens in SingleChildScrollView to resolve pixel errors.
User Validation - Improved registration logic to prevent spaces in @usernames.
Code Clean-up - Resolved all lint warnings and structural errors for the final build.
